_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
source_files: Iris Prolapse repair Secondary IOL Endopthalmitis SFIOL Guidelines_Medco.pdf
Iris Prolapse repair Secondary IOL Endopthalmitis SFIOL Guidelines_PPD.CPD.pdf

clinical_thresholds.note: Best Corrected Visual Acuity (BCVA) < 6/9 is a pop-up scenario in the TMS for processing doctors to check manually.

preauth.label: Clinical notes with indications and planned line of management
Clinical photograph of the affected part with full face picture of the patient

claim.label: Still image of the patient undergoing the procedure with patient ID, date & time

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes, documentation of pre-operative eye examination supporting indication for intervention?
Clinical Photograph of affected part with proper labelling (L/R) with full-face photograph?

cpd_claim.q: Is a still image of patient undergoing the procedure with patient ID, date and time available?

Is there a documentary evidence to show that the patient has been examined for any evidence of signs and symptoms justifying the need for surgery for Iris prolapse-Repair, Secondary IOL/ IOL exchange/ explant, Endopthalmitis (excluding Vitrectomy), SFIOL (including vitrectomy)?
Is the detailed patient discharge summary available?
Is barcode of lens available in case of Secondary IOL/IOL exchange/ explant and SFIOL (including vitrectomy) surgery?

common_queries: Pre-operative clinical notes or documentation of eye examination supporting indication for intervention is missing or insufficient.
Clinical photograph of the affected part is missing, improperly labelled (L/R), or does not include a full-face picture of the patient.
Still image of the patient undergoing the procedure with patient ID, date, and time is missing or incomplete.
Documentary evidence of patient examination, signs, or symptoms justifying the need for surgery is missing or insufficient.
Detailed operative notes are missing or incomplete.
Detailed patient discharge summary is missing or incomplete.
BCVA not documented or documented as >= 6/9 without adequate justification.
